Tests the deletion of a property from the global object in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple script that demonstrates the deletion of a property from the global object in JavaScript. It first assigns a property named `prop` with the value `"prop"` to the global object using `this.prop`. The script then uses the `delete` operator to remove the `prop` property and asserts that the operation returns `true`, indicating that the property was successfully deleted. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing on the behavior of the `delete` operator in a global context.
